prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约16285→15611→15588→21345→17424，整体波动较大；2024年因选科要求调整（物化绑定）导致位次大幅后移至21345，2025年回升至17424，近两年均值约19385名；2025年基准位次约17424名；2021–2025年物理类招生计划分别为175、177、178、182、179人，基本稳定在175–182人之间；2026年计划大幅扩招至211人，较2025年增加32人（+17.9%），扩招幅度显著，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第53位持续上升至2026年第44位，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力认可度增强；2025年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及投档线在全国范围出现溃败，黑龙江考生以389分被录取等异常信号，引发社会关注；2026年声誉评价仍偏负面，但多为中性管理类事件；抖音热度总排名第8（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度较高。历史投档异常（2022年广西暴跌近4万位、2025年全国溃败）可能对2026年报考心理产生滞后影响，部分考生可能持"抄底"心态；第五轮学科评估中暂无A-及以上学科记录，但作为综合性大学，在化学、材料、临床医学、水利工程等领域有较强学科基础，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学持续推荐，法学分化观望，土木建筑、新闻传播明显劝退；福建省2026年高考总人数约26.79万，较2025年（约25.23万）增加约1.56万人（+6.2%），按近年比例估算物理类考生约20.36万人，较2025年（19.21万）增加约1.15万人，竞争加剧；郑州大学位于河南省，在福建省属跨省招生；该校在福建招生占比约3–5%（2024年福建招生30人/全国759人≈3.95%），属中等偏低水平，地域偏好因素不显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次17424、2026年大幅扩招32人（+17.9%）、福建省物理类考生增加约1.15万人（+6.0%）、学校软科排名持续上升、声誉偏负面但抖音高热关注等因素，扩招和考生增加双重推动竞争加剧，位次数字预计后移；预测2026年物理类最低位次约19493名，区间18993–19993名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 16285 → 15611 → 15588 → 21345 → 17424, showing significant fluctuations overall; in 2024, due to adjustments in subject selection requirements (physics-chemistry binding), the ranking dropped sharply to 21345, rebounding to 17424 in 2025, with a two-year average of about 19385; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 17424; enrollment plans for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 175, 177, 178, 182, and 179 respectively, remaining stable between 175 and 182; in 2026, the plan significantly expands to 211, an increase of 32 (+17.9%) compared to 2025, with a notable expansion rate, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has risen from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing recognition of the university's comprehensive strength; the reputation evaluation in 2025 was somewhat negative, mainly involving abnormal signals such as a collapse in admission scores nationwide, with a candidate from Heilongjiang being admitted with a score of 389, attracting social attention; the reputation evaluation in 2026 remains somewhat negative, but mostly neutral management incidents; Douyin popularity ranks 8th overall (high heat), with significant exposure on short video platforms, leading to high application attention. Historical admission anomalies (a drop of nearly 40,000 places in Guangxi in 2022, nationwide collapse in 2025) may have a lagging effect on application psychology in 2026, with some candidates possibly adopting a 'bottom-fishing' mindset; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no records of A- or above disciplines, but as a comprehensive university, it has strong disciplinary foundations in fields such as chemistry, materials, clinical medicine, and water conservancy engineering, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended with social heat; Clinical Medicine and Stomatology are consistently recommended; Law is divided with caution; Civil Engineering and Architecture, Journalism and Communication are clearly discouraged; the total number of Gaokao candidates in Fujian Province in 2026 is approximately 267,900, an increase of about 15,600 (+6.2%) compared to 2025 (about 252,300); estimated Physics Category candidates are about 203,600, an increase of about 11,500 compared to 2025 (192,100), intensifying competition; Zhengzhou University is located in Henan Province, recruiting across provinces in Fujian; the university's enrollment proportion in Fujian is about 3–5% (30 Fujian recruits out of 759 nationwide in 2024 ≈ 3.95%), at a moderately low level, with no significant regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 17424, a significant expansion of 32 places (+17.9%) in 2026, an increase of about 11,500 Physics Category candidates in Fujian (+6.0%), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, a somewhat negative reputation but high Douyin attention, the dual push of expansion and candidate increase intensifies competition, with the ranking number expected to move backward; the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 19493, with a range of 18993–19993.

Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mathematics, Physics, Mechanical, etc.) as primary choices, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence, Clinical Medicine, etc.) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Economics, Business Administration, English, etc.) as safety options; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 18993) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; candidates with rankings near the upper bound of the range (around 19993) should prioritize Tier 3 safety options and cautiously select Tier 1 majors.
